events.title: high blood pressure
events.event_summary: Problem-oriented bundle for high blood pressure.
supporting_evidence: The doctor does not plan to start the patient on medication for depression.
The patient's blood pressure is elevated.
The doctor wants to increase the lisinopril to 40 milligrams once a day to control the patient's high blood pressure.
The doctor observed blood pressure readings of almost 200.
The patient has trace pitting edema to the lower extremities.
The patient has a systolic ejection murmur.
